    • Examples
    • Full scRNA-seq Workflow

YAP Project — scRNA-seq Analysis

example_workflow.Rmd

0. Setup 

library(easypackages)
libraries(c(
  "dplyr", "ggplot2", "ggpubr", "patchwork", "stringr",
  "BPCells", "Seurat", "ComplexHeatmap", "SingleCellExperiment",
  "RColorBrewer", "viridis", "BiocParallel"
))
register(MulticoreParam(workers = 8, progressbar = TRUE))
library(scSidekick)

dirs <- GenerateDirectories(
  base_dir       = "/dir/",
  subset         = "AllClusters",
  object_name    = "YAP",
  resolution     = 1,
  output_subdirs = c("Featuremaps", "DotPlots", "Pathways", "CellChat")
)

1. Load Samples 

basedir <- "/basedir/"

sample_meta <- data.frame(
  sample_id = c("YSGm", "YSGf", "SGm", "SGf"),
  Sample    = c("YSGm", "YSGf", "SGm", "SGf"),
  run_id    = paste0("MYSC", 25:28),
  Genotype  = c("YSG", "YSG", "SG", "SG"),
  sex       = c("M", "F", "M", "F"),
  batch     = 1L
)

SeuratObj <- LoadSamplesRNA(
  sample_ids       = sample_meta$Sample,
  run_ids          = sample_meta$run_id,
  metadata         = sample_meta,
  input_type       = "10x_dir",
  base_dir         = basedir,
  robj_dir         = dirs$robj_dir,
  merged_filename  = "unfilteredAllClusters.rds",
  merge_samples    = TRUE,
  modality         = "scRNA-seq",
  mt_pattern       = "^mt-",
  save_individual  = TRUE,   # cache per-sample .rds so you can resume if interrupted
  resume           = TRUE,
  output_dir       = dirs$output_dir
)

2. QC 

PlotQCMetrics(SeuratObj,
  sample_col = "Sample",
  species    = "mouse",
  output_dir = dirs$output_dir
)

3. Filter & Summarise 

SeuratObj <- subset(SeuratObj,
  subset = DoubletStatus == "singlet" & miQC.keep == "keep"
)

PlotMetaSummary(SeuratObj,
  variables     = "Genotype",
  fill_variable = "Sample",
  row_variable  = "sex",
  count_unit    = "cells",
  percent       = FALSE,
  output_dir    = dirs$output_dir
)

4. Prepare Object (colors + defaults) 

SeuratObj <- PrepObject(SeuratObj,
  variables     = c("Sample", "sex", "Genotype"),
  palettes      = c(Sample = "spectrum", sex = "all", Genotype = "auto"),
  custom_colors = list(sex = c("F" = "#F37388", "M" = "#003F5C")),
  force         = TRUE,
  output_dir    = dirs$output_dir,
  object_name   = dirs$object_name
)

5. Normalise, Reduce, Cluster 

SeuratObj <- SeuratObj %>%
  NormalizeData() %>%
  FindVariableFeatures(nfeatures = 2000) %>%
  ScaleData() %>%
  RunPCA(npcs = 50)

SeuratObj <- harmony::RunHarmony(SeuratObj, group.by.vars = "Sample")

dims <- Determine_nDims(SeuratObj, reduction = "harmony")

SeuratObj <- SeuratObj %>%
  RunUMAP(dims = 1:dims$n_dims, reduction = "harmony") %>%
  FindNeighbors(dims = 1:dims$n_dims, reduction = "harmony") %>%
  FindClusters(resolution = 0.5)

CellInfo <- SeuratObj@meta.data
CellInfo$Cluster <- RenameClusters(SeuratObj$seurat_clusters)
SeuratObj@meta.data <- CellInfo

saveRDS(SeuratObj, file.path(dirs$robj_dir, "clustered.rds"))

6. Initial Cluster UMAPs 

SeuratObj <- PrepObject(SeuratObj,
  variables  = c("Cluster"),
  group.by   = "Genotype",
  split.by   = "sex"
)
ShowColors(SeuratObj)

PlotDimPlots(SeuratObj,
  group.by   = c("Cluster", "Sample", "Genotype", "sex"),
  split.by   = NULL,
  show_trend = FALSE,
  join_plots = TRUE,
  join_nrow  = 1,
  join_ncol  = 4,
  width      = 12,
  height     = 5
)

7. Marker Discovery & Heatmap 

de <- RunWilcoxAUC(SeuratObj, group.by = "Cluster")

det <- de %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  top_n(10, wt = logFC)

GroupHeatmap(SeuratObj,
  features       = det$feature,
  feature_split  = det$group,     # unnamed vector — matched positionally
  group.by       = c("Sample", "sex", "Genotype"),
  column_split_by = "Cluster"
)

8. Automated Cell-Type Annotation 

SeuratObj <- CellTypeAssignmentHelper(SeuratObj,
  singler_ref    = "celldex::ImmGenData()",
  markers        = de,
  cluster_column = "Cluster",
  species        = "mouse",
  sctype_tissues = c("Immune system", "Brain"),
  marker_groups  = list(
    "Brain"  = c("Tumor", "Brain Stroma"),
    "Immune" = c("Lymphocytes", "Monocytes", "Macrophages",
                 "Granulocytes", "Bone Marrow Derived", "All")
  ),
  output_dir     = dirs$output_dir
)

9. Manual Assignment 

Assign <- list(
  CyclingTumor = c("C03", "C07", "C05"),
  Astrocytes   = "C11",
  Oligos       = "C12",
  Immune       = "C13"
)

SeuratObj <- AssignCellTypes(SeuratObj, Assign,
  cluster_col = "Cluster",
  new_col     = "GlobalAssignment",
  other       = "Tumor"
)

SeuratObj <- PrepObject(SeuratObj,
  variables = "GlobalAssignment"
)
ShowColors(SeuratObj)

saveRDS(SeuratObj, file.path(dirs$robj_dir, "annotated.rds"))

10. Annotation UMAPs & Composition 

PlotDimPlots(SeuratObj,
  group.by    = c("Cluster", "rcellmarker_CellType", "GlobalAssignment"),
  show_labels = TRUE,
  split.by    = NULL,
  show_trend  = FALSE,
  join_plots  = TRUE,
  legendnrow  = 5,
  join_nrow   = 1,
  join_ncol   = 3,
  width       = 9,
  height      = 5
)

PlotTrendLabeled(SeuratObj,
  stat.by  = "GlobalAssignment",
  group.by = "Genotype",
  split.by = "sex",
  ncol     = 1
)

11. Feature Plots (top markers per cluster) 

TopDE <- de %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  top_n(3, wt = logFC)

PlotFeaturePlots(SeuratObj,
  features       = TopDE$feature,
  split.by       = "Genotype",
  row.by         = "sex",
  layout_method  = "metadata",
  output_dir     = dirs$featuremaps
)

12. Pathway Analysis 

RunGSEA(SeuratObj,
  group.by   = "Sample",
  species    = "Mus musculus",
  split.by   = "GlobalAssignment",
  output_dir = dirs$pathways
)

13. Cell-Cell Communication 

cc_results <- RunCellChat(SeuratObj,
  cell.by    = "GlobalAssignment",
  group.by   = "Genotype",
  species    = "mouse",
  output_dir = dirs$cellchat
)

CompareCellChat(
  cellchat_list = cc_results,
  output_dir    = file.path(dirs$cellchat, "Comparison")
)

14. Methods Log & Report 

log_analysis_params(
  obj         = SeuratObj,
  assay_type  = "scRNAseq",
  output_dir  = dirs$output_dir,
  dataset     = dirs$object_name,
  subset_name = dirs$subset
)

create_analysis_pptx(
  output_dir  = dirs$output_dir,
  object_name = dirs$object_name
)

On this page
